commentaries.author: Aquinas Study Bible
commentaries.content: daughters of Jerusalem: those weak in faith, who are called "daughters" to emphasize their weak, feminine-like nature.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Love. She seems insensible to the insults received. (Calmet)
The Church prays to the saints on earth, and in heaven. (Menochius)
